## Debouncer.(constructor)

Constructs a new instance of the `Debouncer` class

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
constructor(cb: T, waitTime: number, maxWaitTime: number);
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  cb | T | trigger callback |
|  waitTime | number | time to wait before invoking cb |
|  maxWaitTime | number | maximum wait time from first triggering |
